concerns.text: The plan cites a HuggingFace CSV of 'cluster_markers' for GSE131907 as the primary source, but the pipeline requires raw count matrices to perform log-CPM transformation and compute geometric diagnostics (Trustworthiness/LCA) on the high-dimensional space. A CSV of markers is insufficient for the required analysis; the plan must identify a verified source containing the full count matrix and cell metadata, or the methodology cannot proceed as written.

The plan explicitly blocks GSE111322 and GSE150728 due to 'NO verified source found' in the allowed block. However, the Functional Requirements (FR-001) and Spec mandate the inclusion of these three specific datasets. Proceeding with only one dataset (GSE131907) violates the study design which relies on a mixed-effects model with 'dataset' as a random effect; a single dataset cannot support this statistical model, rendering the core research question unanswerable.
